title: Synthetic bridge — mild subcritical pulse (mode 2 implicit)

parity_program.notes: Hybrid implicit low-flow bridge Jacobian (B1 pinning + B3 explicit fallback).

scope.notes: Same mild Yarnell case as bridge_mild_unsteady_linked with unsteady_structure_coupling_mode=2.

stream1d.notes: Subcritical low-flow implicit rows; high-flow defers to solve_bridge_coupled.

reference.notes: Mode 0 terminal WSEL baseline — mode 2 must not regress checkpoints.
